reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_110]]
Speaker 2: That’s why we stay closely connected with our alumni and invite them to serve as mentors or coaches, sharing their knowledge and professional experience with current students to further enrich and elevate the online learning experience.

[[BLOCK:srt_111]]
Speaker 2: All right.

[[BLOCK:srt_112]]
Speaker 3: Let’s continue.

[[BLOCK:srt_113]]
Speaker 2: Just look at me.

[[BLOCK:srt_114]]
Speaker 3: That’s better.

[[BLOCK:srt_115]]
Speaker 3: Could you explain how the university selects and assigns faculty for these programs?

[[BLOCK:srt_116]]
Speaker 3: What kind of professors will Chinese students be learning from?

[[BLOCK:srt_117]]
Speaker 1: We begin by identifying leaders in their respective fields—in other words, we want instructors who are actively engaged on the front lines of the industries they teach.

[[BLOCK:srt_118]]
Speaker 1: So we recruit accomplished professionals who have built distinguished careers, remain at the cutting edge of practice, and can bring real-world experience into the classroom to share with students.

[[BLOCK:srt_119]]
Speaker 1: At the same time, we also invite professors from the world’s top universities to join Golden Gate University and contribute to our teaching.

[[BLOCK:srt_120]]
Speaker 1: In short, we aim for the very best of the best—outstanding practitioners who have achieved excellence in their fields, as well as leading scholars and professors from top institutions around the world and in China.

[[BLOCK:srt_121]]
Speaker 3: So how does Golden Gate University ensure that its curriculum is designed to achieve this goal?
